---
name: shape
description: Converge a rough request into a chat-only proposal-ready plan.
---

# Shape

## Workflow

`shape` is chat-only. It settles the Decision Gate dimensions before
`proposal-ready`: Goal, Scope, Approach, Validation, and Plan Strategy.

See `references/output-format.md`.

## Output

Return `clarifying`, `blocked`, `proposal-ready`, or `handoff`.
